document.name: Riverdale Y Dance — Broadway Jazz C
document.shortDescription: Weekly Riverdale Y jazz class for ages 9–11 focused on Broadway-inspired movement and musical-theater style, scheduled on Tuesdays after school.
document.longDescription:
Broadway Jazz C at Riverdale Y Dance is a youth class for ages 9–11. The official class page describes it as a popular option for young musical-theater fans, exploring music and moves from favorite Broadway musicals as either a standalone class or a complement to musical-theater training.

The official Spring Semester schedule on the class page lists Broadway Jazz C on Tuesdays from 5:00 p.m. to 5:45 p.m., with a start date of February 3 and an end date of June 14. The same page lists days off on February 17 and April 7.

The Riverdale Y Dance overview page says dance classes meet weekly during two semesters and culminate with a recital on the organization’s in-house stage in June; it lists the fall semester as September through January and the spring semester as February through June. That overview page also says families can try a class during the first two weeks of the semester by registering for a trial at the front desk, with a published $25 trial fee that can be applied toward registration using code TRIAL25.

Contact details shown on the cited pages: Riverdale Y, 5625 Arlington Avenue, Bronx, NY 10471; general phone 718-548-8200; dance program email dance@riverdaley.org. The public pages reviewed do not publish Broadway Jazz C tuition, so this listing keeps the planning price at 0 until Riverdale Y publishes or confirms the program fee.

Sources: https://riverdaley.org/performing-arts/dance/jazz/ https://riverdaley.org/performing-arts/dance/
document.announcementDescription: Official page lists Broadway Jazz C on Tuesdays from 5:00 to 5:45 p.m. through June 14, with select days off noted on-page.
